channel.title: Canyon on Mizubikes
channel.description: Recent content in Canyon on Mizubikes

item.title: Canyon's New Grail CFR Is the Aeroad of Gravel Bikes
item.description: Canyon's unreleased Grail CFR prototype was spotted at The Traka in Girona this week — and it looks exactly like what you'd expect if you've been watching the Aeroad family tree grow.

item.title: Canyon Endurace CFR 2026 Review: Should You Buy It?
item.description: The new Canyon Endurace CFR just launched with Aeroad geometry, Aeroad looks, and 35mm tire clearance. We break down who it's actually for and whether it's worth $10,499.
